CustomField.description: This is a technical field created which is used to overcome CPQ limitations where "account cannot be changed on the activated contract" (INC0289063). The Account LKUP field will be used during amendment process only. *** See ATEAM-1752 for attachment of Lookup Filter removed from this field 2022.07.07 release
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This account is used when an amendment is needed on an existing contract to a different account name, but for the same parent account.
CustomField.label: Amendment Account
